2604.24562.title: Towards Lawful Autonomous Driving: Deriving Scenario-Aware Driving Requirements from Traffic Laws and Regulations
2604.24562.paper_summary: Driving in compliance with traffic laws and regulations is a basic requirement for human drivers, yet autonomous vehicles (AVs) can violate these requirements in diverse real-world scenarios. To encode law compliance into AV systems, conventional approaches use formal logic languages to explicitly specify behavioral constraints, but this process is labor-intensive, hard to scale, and costly to maintain. With recent advances in artificial intelligence, it is promising to leverage large language models (LLMs) to derive legal requirements from traffic laws and regulations. However, without explicitly grounding and reasoning in structured traffic scenarios, LLMs often retrieve irrelevant provisions or miss applicable ones, yielding imprecise requirements. To address this, we propose a novel pipeline that grounds LLM reasoning in a traffic scenario taxonomy through node-wise anchors that encode hierarchical semantics. On Chinese traffic laws and OnSite dataset (5,897 scenarios), our method improves law-scenario matching by 29.1\% and increases the accuracy of derived mandatory and prohibitive requirements by 36.9\% and 38.2\%, respectively. We further demonstrate real-world applicability by constructing a law-compliance layer for AV navigation and developing an onboard, real-time compliance monitor for in-field testing, providing a solid foundation for future AV development, deployment, and regulatory oversight.
2604.24562.paper_summary_zh: 遵守交通法規是人類駕駛者的基本要求，然而自動駕駛車輛（AV）在多樣的現實場景中可能違反這些要求。為了將法律遵從性編碼到AV系統中，傳統的方法使用形式邏輯語言來明確指定行為約束，但這一過程勞動密集、難以擴展且維護成本高昂。隨著人工智慧的最新進展，利用大型語言模型（LLMs）從交通法規中推導法律要求變得充滿希望。然而，若不在結構化的交通場景中明確基礎和推理，LLMs往往檢索到不相關的條款或漏掉適用的條款，導致要求不精確。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個新穎的流程，通過編碼層次語義的節點錨點將LLM推理與交通場景分類法相結合。在中國交通法規和OnSite數據集（5,897個場景）上，我們的方法提高了法律與場景匹配的準確率29.1\%，並分別提高了推導的強制性和禁止性要求的準確率36.9\%和38.2\%。我們進一步通過為AV導航構建法律遵從層和開發現場測試的即時合規監控器來展示其在現實世界中的適用性，為未來AV的開發、部署和監管監督提供了堅實的基礎。
2604.24562.author: Bowen Jian et.al.
2604.24562.authors: Bowen Jian, Rongjie Yu, Hong Wang, Liqiang Wang, Zihang Zou
